  • Download Rmd

NF1 patients

Tumor cells trajectory using slingshot

Audrey

2023-05-03

This script is used to infer trajectory on tumor cells, using slingshot.

library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(ggplot2)

.libPaths()
## [1] "/usr/local/lib/R/library"

Preparation

In this section, we set the global settings of the analysis. We will store data there :

save_name = "patients_tumor_cells"
out_dir = "."

We load the sample information :

sample_info = readRDS(file = paste0(out_dir, "/../1_metadata/patients_sample_info.rds"))
project_names_oi = as.character(sample_info$project_name)

graphics::pie(rep(1, nrow(sample_info)),
              col = sample_info$color,
              labels = sample_info$project_name)

This are the settings for trajectory inference :

traj_dimred = "mnn"          # to infer trajectory on
traj_umap = "mnn_39_umap"    # just of visualization
seed = 1337L
traj_max_dims = 39           # to infer trajectory on

We load the Seurat object :

sobj = readRDS(paste0(out_dir, "/", save_name, "_sobj.rds"))
sobj
## An object of class Seurat 
## 23308 features across 21028 samples within 2 assays 
## Active assay: RNA (21308 features, 2000 variable features)
##  1 other assay present: mnn.reconstructed
##  8 dimensional reductions calculated: RNA_pca, RNA_pca_39_tsne, RNA_pca_39_umap, mnn, mnn_39_tsne, mnn_39_umap, mnn_dm, mnn_dm_umap

Trajectory inference

We perform the trajectory inference :

input_data = sobj@reductions[[traj_dimred]]@cell.embeddings[, c(1:traj_max_dims)]
root_cell_id = "GSM5404032_CAACCAATCCCGAGAC-1"

my_traj = slingshot::slingshot(data = input_data,
                               clusterLabels = sobj$seurat_clusters,
                               start.clus   = sobj$seurat_clusters[root_cell_id])
my_traj
## class: SlingshotDataSet 
## 
##  Samples Dimensions
##    21028         39
## 
## lineages: 8 
## Lineage1: 1  6  14  3  13  7  0  4  5  
## Lineage2: 1  6  14  3  13  7  17  16  
## Lineage3: 1  6  14  3  13  7  12  8  
## Lineage4: 1  6  14  3  2  9  
## Lineage5: 1  6  14  3  2  15  
## Lineage6: 1  6  14  3  13  18  
## Lineage7: 1  6  14  3  11  
## Lineage8: 1  10  
## 
## curves: 8 
## Curve1: Length: 1.3862   Samples: 12557.18
## Curve2: Length: 1.7222   Samples: 7413.73
## Curve3: Length: 1.3914   Samples: 8541.7
## Curve4: Length: 1.0976   Samples: 7548.42
## Curve5: Length: 1.1408   Samples: 7355.48
## Curve6: Length: 1.3672   Samples: 6068.59
## Curve7: Length: 0.97843  Samples: 6368.29
## Curve8: Length: 0.72753  Samples: 3196.55
## Add pseudotime
sobj$pseudotime = slingshot::slingPseudotime(my_traj)[, 1][colnames(sobj)]

(Time to run : 28974.55 s)

There are two trajectories :

  • going from the root to the grafted tumor
  • going from the root to the cells expressing a high level of mitochondrial genes, from the donor (dead end)
head(slingshot::slingPseudotime(my_traj))
##                                   curve1     curve2     curve3     curve4
## GSM5404032_AAACCCATCACAATGC-1 0.68250405 0.68291478 0.68616904 0.71690444
## GSM5404032_AAACCCATCCACACCT-1         NA         NA         NA         NA
## GSM5404032_AAACCCATCTGGAGAG-1 0.09434321 0.09436656 0.09438536 0.09442136
## GSM5404032_AAACGAACAGAAGCTG-1 0.65747538 0.65130228 0.65990108 0.71138473
## GSM5404032_AAACGAACATAGAAAC-1 0.50512738 0.50568042 0.50440005 0.52841503
## GSM5404032_AAACGAAGTTGCGGCT-1 0.19093378 0.19075584 0.19084585 0.19244811
##                                   curve5     curve6     curve7     curve8
## GSM5404032_AAACCCATCACAATGC-1 0.84836810 0.71879605 0.87320408         NA
## GSM5404032_AAACCCATCCACACCT-1         NA         NA 0.92800201         NA
## GSM5404032_AAACCCATCTGGAGAG-1 0.09444649 0.09436411 0.09445686 0.09728363
## GSM5404032_AAACGAACAGAAGCTG-1 0.69326725 0.68296096 0.88834703         NA
## GSM5404032_AAACGAACATAGAAAC-1 0.50018285 0.51430846 0.53242267         NA
## GSM5404032_AAACGAAGTTGCGGCT-1 0.19235620 0.19158233 0.19257773 0.20516158

Visualization

We visualize pseudotime :

Seurat::FeaturePlot(sobj, features = "pseudotime",
                    reduction = traj_umap,
                    cols = viridis::viridis(n = 100)) +
  ggplot2::ggtitle("Pseudotime") +
  ggplot2::theme(aspect.ratio = 1,
                 plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  Seurat::NoAxes()

Save

We save the Seurat object :

saveRDS(sobj, file = paste0(out_dir, "/", save_name, "_sobj_traj_slingshot.rds"))

We save the trajectory object :

saveRDS(my_traj, file = paste0(out_dir, "/", save_name, "_my_traj_slingshot.rds"))
